title: REFEREE_STATS_RESULT
description: Response from the Keeper containing statistical records for a specified Referee. Derived from accumulated CLAIM_ANCHOR records in the Keeper.

terminal_id.description: Terminal ID of the queried Referee.

found.description: Whether anchoring records for this terminal_id exist in the Keeper. If false, all statistical fields are omitted.

assessment_count.description: Total number of CONTRIBUTION_RESULTs issued. Counted from ASSESSMENT_ISSUED anchors. Excludes POH_CERTIFICATEs, which are counted separately in poh_cert_count.

poh_cert_count.description: Total number of POH_CERTIFICATEs issued. Counted from POH_CERT_ISSUED anchors. Kept separate from assessment_count so Proof of Human Involvement volume does not distort the incident-assessment reputation metrics (appeal_rate, named_as_actor_rate, etc.) whose denominator is assessment_count.

appeal_rate.description: appeal_count / assessment_count. May exceed 1.0 if multiple appeals were filed against the same assessment.

appealed_assessment_count.description: Number of distinct assessments that received at least one appeal. Multiple appeals on the same assessment are counted as one.

appeal_accepted_count.description: Number of appeals this Referee accepted (APPEAL_ACCEPTED anchors).

appeal_rejected_count.description: Number of appeals this Referee rejected (APPEAL_REJECTED anchors).

named_as_actor_count.description: Number of times this Referee has been named as Actor in another incident (NAMED_AS_ACTOR anchors). A strong signal of assessment quality, as filing costs are borne by the Claimant.

anchor_continuity.description: Whether the Referee's anchor sequence has no gaps. A gap indicates missing records and is a negative reliability signal.

active_since.description: Timestamp of the earliest anchoring record for this Referee.

last_active.description: Timestamp of the most recent anchoring record for this Referee.

unreceived_count.description: Number of FIXED-model incidents for which this Keeper holds an ASSESSMENT_ISSUED or POH_CERT_ISSUED anchor but no corresponding FEE_RECEIPT (RFC-0001 Section 6.24). Maintained by the Referee's own Keeper — the endpoint that answers REFEREE_STATS_QUERY — from the receipt copies the Referee is obliged to send it; an escrow-holding Keeper observes the same deficiency as an escrow that never reaches SETTLED. FREE-model incidents are excluded from this count. A persistently non-zero value indicates the Referee may be receiving payment without acknowledging receipt and is a negative trust signal.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this result was issued by the Keeper.
